title: chaetocephala lonchophylla
intro: Chaetocephala lonchophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of fleabane. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which are primarily attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Chaetocephala lonchophylla include relief from digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Chaetocephala lonchophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
